name: diffguard-ai-test-officer
description: AI 测试官：理解 PR / 需求变更的全链路自动化测试 Agent

scripts.demo: tsx agent/src/index.ts run --diff examples/pr-diff/coupon-stack.diff --requirement examples/requirements/coupon-stack.md --contract ai-test.yaml --mode dry-run
scripts.demo:execute: tsx agent/src/index.ts run --diff examples/pr-diff/coupon-stack.diff --requirement examples/requirements/coupon-stack.md --contract ai-test.yaml --mode execute
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,payment-mock -c auto "npm run dev -w apps/demo-shop-backend" "npm run dev -w apps/demo-shop-frontend" "tsx mocks/payment/server.ts"
scripts.build: npm run build -w agent && npm run build -w apps/demo-shop-backend && npm run build -w apps/demo-shop-frontend
